topic: Sui Move contract authoring (Move 2024 edition, mainnet toolchain)

coverage.note: not recorded — coverage completeness is unverified

falsification.question: Held-out Sui Move contract tasks - does the pack improve output quality on the pinned toolchain (sui 1.74.1-8fc60f1fa966)?

experiment_1.verdict: ceiling - metric could not discriminate; did not clear the ship rule

experiment_2.metrics: compile-pass (primary) + zero-warning clean-compile (secondary), pre-registered before answers at commit b9653b6
experiment_2.verdict: primary tie, secondary kp wins -> ships under pre-registered rule branch 2

experiment_3.metrics: compile-pass (primary) + zero-warning clean-compile (secondary), 6 held-out tasks, claude-haiku-4-5 all arms, pre-registered before answers at commit b5c9fe9; headline comparison = deepened pack (kp61, 8c1a2e5) vs pre-deepening pack (kp47, 82d55df)
experiment_3.verdict: kp61 > kp47 on the primary -> deepening improves the pack, ships under pre-registered rule branch 1; secondary tied 1/6 all arms (no cleanliness claim). The taught use-self corner (E03003) recurred twice in the kp47 arm and zero taught-class failures appeared in kp61. Disclosed correction: one task (escrow-swap) overlaps experiment 1's task 4, contrary to the pre-registered held-out assertion; excluding it the primary is kp61 4/5 vs kp47 2/5 - verdict unchanged.

falsification.verdict: pack improves cleanliness/modern-idiom compliance (pre-registered clean-compile: kp 3/5 vs base 2/5); it does NOT raise raw compile-pass for claude-sonnet-4-6 (tie both experiments). Known gap at falsification time: transfer::receive/Receiving<T> (both arms failed identically, Sui E02009). Gap closed 2026-07-07 by the fixture-proven receiving beat added AFTER the experiment; the recorded numbers were measured on the 44-claim pack. Deepening round 1 (2026-07-07, docs/deepening/round-1/) added 14 more claims after these experiments; experiment 3 (pre-registered, held-out) then measured the deepening delta for claude-haiku-4-5: deepened pack 4/6 compile-pass vs pre-deepening pack 2/6 -> deepening improves the pack (ship rule branch 1). Each experiment's numbers stay pinned to the pack size and model they measured. Deepening round 2 (2026-07-07, docs/deepening/round-2/) added 25 more claims (61 -> 86) AFTER experiment 3; its held-out effect has not yet been measured (tier-2 falsification pending).
